Level 3 (Action Required) is a severity classification defined within EXHIBIT D. SEC-01 explicitly states the exhibit defines 'Severity Level classifications and service level objectives,' which are detailed in SEC-02.

Level 4 (Crisis) is a severity classification defined within EXHIBIT D. SEC-01 explicitly states the exhibit defines 'Severity Level classifications and service level objectives,' which are detailed in SEC-02.
